title: morelotia microcarpa
intro: Morelotia microcarpa, also known as the 'Lesser Tree Magnolia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Magnoliaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Morelotia microcarpa include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Morelotia microcarpa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to promote sweating and relieve body aches.
